name: Crisp Baked Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken portions; quarters or breasts skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Place the chicken pieces in a greased baking dish.
3. In a screw-top jar, combine oil, lemon juice, mustard, salt, pepper, dried sage, and onion. Shake well until thoroughly mixed.
4. Brush each chicken piece generously with the mustard-and-onion mixture, ensuring even coverage on top.
5. Press soft bread crumbs onto each chicken piece as it is brushed with the mixture to create an even coating.
6. Bake the coated chicken for 50-60 minutes, or until crisp and golden outside and thoroughly cooked through. The juices should run clear when pierced with a knife.
7. Serve immediately.
